name: HMS Patti (4.10280)
events: 19 Dec 1943 At 1030 hours, HMS Rorqual (Lt. G.S.C. Clarabut, DSO, RN), made rendez-vous off Bishops Rock with HMS Patti (T/A/Skr.Lt. J.R.C. Reader, RNR). They then proceeded in company to Falmouth where they arrived at 1915 hours. (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
